Online Learning

Learn from
anywhere.

The same Zahau curriculum, delivered live one-on-one — with a student dashboard that keeps you on track.

Start free trial
01

Live classes

Real-time video with screen-share and split-camera.

02

1-on-1 mentorship

A single faculty member stays with you across terms.

03

Flexible scheduling

Reschedule up to two classes per term, no questions asked.

04

Interactive assignments

Weekly play-along tasks and recording uploads.

05

Progress dashboard

Track time, repertoire, theory milestones, and recordings.

06

Studio sessions

Visit Delhi twice a year for a recording weekend (optional).

07

Global recitals

Quarterly online recitals streamed to family and friends.

08

International certification

Sit ABRSM and Trinity exams from your home city.

Newsletter

Stay in the loop

Subscribe to receive announcements for student recitals, faculty masterclasses, and educational resources.

Zahaumusic

Excellence in musical education. Dedicated to fostering a culture of virtuosity, rigorous craft, and creative exploration.
